pr.title: PR #123 — Capability Event Timeline Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds a **capability event timeline** so Axiom captures everything that happened around a capability (PR lifecycle, CI, review, bug fixes, tests, artifacts, recordings, screenshots, skills, warnings, notes) — not just the PR itself. Events are **append-only** and ordered deterministically. This is additive identity/registry-layer metadata; no GitHub/Devin ingestion and no orchestration.

New module `src/axiom_core/capability_event_timeline.py`:
- `CapabilityEventType` — 16 event types: `PR_CREATED, CI_GREEN, REVIEW_STARTED, REVIEW_FINDING, BUG_FIXED, TEST_STARTED, TEST_COMPLETED, ARTIFACT_CREATED, VIDEO_RECORDED, SCREENSHOT_CAPTURED, SKILL_PROPOSED, SKILL_APPROVED, PR_READY, PR_MERGED, WARNING, NOTE`.
- `CapabilityEventReference` — `reference_type/target/label` (files, commits, artifacts, screenshots, recordings, markdown reports, skills, PR URLs).
- `CapabilityEventArtifact` — `artifact_type/path/description`.
- `CapabilityEvent` — `event_id, global_capability_id, timestamp, event_sequence, worker, source, event_type, summary, references[], artifacts[], raw_payload, schema_version`.
- `CapabilityEventTimeline` — append-only ordered collection (`timeline_id, global_capability_id, events[], event_count, created_at, schema_version`).
- `CapabilityEventSummary` — `event_count, event_type_counts, first/last_timestamp, duplicate_sequence_count`.
- `CapabilityEventEvidence` + `CapabilityEventTimelineEngine` (`create / append / get_report / list_reports / export_report`).

**Authoritative timeline ordering** (`_sort_key`):
```python
(timestamp, event_sequence, event_type, event_id)
```
Input order is irrelevant — `create`/`append` re-sort deterministically.

**Append-only**: `append(timeline_id, events)` loads the existing timeline, preserves every existing event verbatim (never removes), adds the new events, and re-sorts. **Raw payload preserved** verbatim. **Schema versioning** via `SCHEMA_VERSION = "1.0"` (overridable per event).

CLI (registered in `command_registry.py`, `test_selection_engine.py`, `test_command_registry.py`):
- `axiom capability-event-create [--timeline-file <tf>] [--json-output]`
- `axiom capability-event-append <timeline_id> [--timeline-file <tf>] [--json-output]`
- `axiom capability-event-list [--json-output]`
- `axiom capability-event-show <timeline_id> [--json-output]`
- `axiom capability-event-export <timeline_id> [--format markdown|json|csv]`

**Three export formats**: JSON, Markdown timeline (`- [seq] ts [TYPE] summary` with nested refs/artifacts), CSV (flattened per-event columns). Evidence bundle under `artifacts/capability_event_timeline/<timeline_id>/`: `capability_event_request.json`, `capability_event_result.json`, `capability_event_summary.md`, `capability_event_timeline.csv`, `pass_fail.json` (+ `report.json`).

**Pass/fail**: `passed = event_count > 0 AND duplicate_sequence_count == 0` (append-only monotonic-sequence integrity).

## What changed / didn't
- **Changed behavior**: new additive event timeline + 5 CLI commands. No existing framework modified.
- **Did not change**: Revit 2024 baseline, architecture/doctrine, dependencies. No GitHub ingestion, no Devin ingestion, no orchestration.
- **Strategic fit**: identity/registry layer — capability metadata belongs in registries; this makes per-capability history machine-traceable (evidence quality).

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **3975 passed, 1 skipped** (+47 new; PR #122 baseline 3928).
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**.
- CLI create/append/list/show/export verified incl. all 3 export formats, deterministic ordering, append-only preservation, and error paths (not-found → exit 2, path-traversal → exit 1).
- Revit live validation: not required (no adapter/baseline changes).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
